title: Deyaah 48Pcs Tetra Tower Balance Game, Stacking Blocks Games, Balancing Swing Stacking Fun Toys Building Blocks for Family Games,Travel, Parties,Team Building Blocks Toy
features: 【Safety-Material】Fun balance toy are made of E-co friendly ABS material, non-toxic ,tasteless, wear-resistant & drop-resistant, not afraid of children chewing, play at ease. The surface of the balance blocks is smooth & burr-free,moderate size , more comfortable to hold.

【Two game modes】 1. Single player challenge mode: Children stack tetra tower individually, which can exercise your child's hand-eye coordination and balance. 2. Fun duo game mode: Take 22 cards; Turn them to the back; Disrupting the order of cards; Randomly draw a card; Follow the prompts on the card to proceed to the next step. Whoever gets the blocks down first loses. Stay away from smart devices, allowing children, parents, and friends to focus on stacking toys.

【Swing stack high child balance toy】 Colorful balance building blocks that help kids learn colors are a great way to develop mental skills, concentration and patience. Building blocks are not only suitable for children to play independently, but also can be used as a bridge for parent-child interaction, promote the development of parent-child relationship, and cultivate children's cooperation spirit and team spirit.

【Tetra Tower Puzzle Design Inspiration】 This amazing balancing block is designed with 3D Tetra Tower blocks & applied in bright colours ---1. Attracting the child's eyes & attention; 2.Stimulating child's imagination & creativity; 3.Exercising their hand-eye coordination & balancing skills. It is also a good choice for families & children whom with ADHD or autism

【Adding fun to life】 This stacking blocks toy is suitable for almost all occasions, such as picnics, parties, barbecues, camping, etc. It is not only a delightful stress relieving game, but can also be used as a unique home decor. The tetra tower is an ideal gift for children, neighbors, friends, students, children, and family (parents). It is also an excellent gift for Children's Day, Christmas, Birthday, Festival, New Year and rewards.
description: Product description 48Pcs Tetra Tower Balance Game, Stacking Blocks Games for Christmas Gift, Balancing Swing Stacking Fun Toys Building Blocks for Family Games, Parties, Travel, Team Building Blocks Toy Moderately Size & Bright Colors Ideal size designed for small hands, not only easy to handle, but also to prevent accidental swallowing. Bright colors, easier to attract children's attention Safe ABS material The tetra tower is made of high quality ABS plastic, durable & harmless, safe for children to play. Lightweight & easy to carry The blocks is small & light-weigh, attached with packaging box, which is very convenient to carry. It is suitable to camping, parks, picnic. Specification Material: ABS Plastic Suitable: 5+ years old Players: 1-2 Package include: 1 * stacked high Tetra Tower Balance Game Directions Included
